revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Daibō Kofun); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>MChew]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Daib%C5%8D_Kofun here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
